ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Non-security knowledge, Defense-related knowledge) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active and available for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the question */,
  "item_no" TEXT /* Item number for the question within the category */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* The correct answer to the question */,
  "false_answer_1" TEXT /* First false answer to the question */,
  "false_answer_2" TEXT /* Second false answer to the question */,
  "false_answer_3" TEXT /* Third false answer to the question */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Indicates the difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "time_limit_seconds" INTEGER /* Time limit for answering the question in seconds */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the question is active and available for use */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the question */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainee, trainer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question attempted */,
  "attempt_date" TEXT /* Date the question was attempted */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the answer was correct */,
  "selected_answer" TEXT /* The answer selected by the user */,
  "time_taken_seconds" INTEGER /* Time taken by the user to answer the question in seconds */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the user after answering the question */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Number of attempts the user has made for the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the training program is active and available for enrollment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the training program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training program was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the training program */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_questions" (
  "training_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training-question link */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question included in the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_questions_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the user enrolled in the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the user completed the training program */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has completed the training program */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Current progress of the user in the training program (e.g., 'in progress', 'completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_enrollments_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trainee, trainer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is active and available for assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
